ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game (e.g., Prisoner's Dilemma) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "number_of_agents" INTEGER /* Number of agents participating in the game */,
  "payoff_matrix" TEXT /* Payoff matrix for the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., zero-sum, non-zero-sum) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the agent is participating in */,
  "initial_strategy" TEXT /* Initial strategy of the agent */,
  "final_strategy" TEXT /* Final strategy of the agent after simulation */,
  "adaptation_rate" REAL /* Rate at which the agent adapts its strategy */,
  "mutation_rate" REAL /* Rate at which the agent's strategy mutates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dynamics" (
  "dynamic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dynamic */,
  "dynamic_name" TEXT /* Name of the dynamic (e.g., replicator, best-response) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dynamic */,
  "update_rule" TEXT /* Update rule for the dynamic (e.g., imitate best, proportional imitation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dynamic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being simulated */,
  "dynamic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dynamic applied in the simulation */,
  "gamma" REAL /* Discount factor for future payoffs */,
  "generations_until_stability" INTEGER /* Number of generations until the strategies stabilize */,
  "initial_distribution" TEXT /* Initial distribution of strategies among agents */,
  "number_of_agents" INTEGER /* Number of agents in the simulation */,
  "random_seed" INTEGER /* Random seed used for the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_dynamic_id FOREIGN KEY ("dynamic_id") REFERENCES dynamics ("dynamic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the result belongs to */,
  "generation" INTEGER /* Generation number in the simulation */,
  "agent_strategy" TEXT /* Strategy of the agent at the given generation */,
  "payoff" REAL /* Payoff of the agent at the given generation */,
  "average_payoff" REAL /* Average payoff of the agent over all generations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, student, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., run, view results) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of parameters */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the parameters belong to */,
  "gamma" REAL /* Discount factor for future payoffs */,
  "initial_distribution" TEXT /* Initial distribution of strategies among agents */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Population size used in the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the simulation */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., editor, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
